question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: I have been less present in rituals, yes.

assessment.note: He confirms reduced presence in team rituals, which is a strong engagement dip and a mild wellbeing concern.

new_queue.label: Less present rituals
new_queue.name: You said 'less present in rituals' — what has that looked like lately?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: What feels different
new_queue.name: What feels different in your week-to-week work since the promotion decision?

new_queue.label: Decision meaning
new_queue.name: What did you take away from the conversation about the promotion decision?

new_queue.label: Path forward
new_queue.name: What path forward feels real to you from here?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
